rulings.Case Title: ARJUN DHINGRA VS. COUNTRYWIDE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 31, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER WITH BAC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Plaintiff has failed to oppose moving party's motion or request leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Reconsider Demurrer To The First Cause Of Action Of Pltf'S First Amended Complaint; Memo Of P & A; Req. For Judicial Ntc And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 31, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF JO FARESE's Motion To Reconsider Demurrer To The First Cause Of Action Of Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint. Deny reconsideration. Failed to sustain burden per CCP 1008. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK MIGDAL et al VS. MASHA LEVINSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Appointing Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 31, 2012, line 7. PLAINTIFF MARK MIGDAL's Motion For Order Appointing Receiver. Motion to appoint receiver is denied without prejudice for the following reasons: 1) Pliantiff failed to nominate receiver; 2) Plaintiff failed to demonstrate that the property is in danger of being materially injured; 3) Appointment of receiver would qualify as default under the United American Bank Deed of Trust; 4) An injunction ordering defendant to turn over half of the profits may protect plaintiff and ther less intrusive remedy is favored over the extraordinay remedy of receivership. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN L. VAN NOORD et al VS. SARAH M. LEWIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 31, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT SARAH LEWIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule five days answer. Complaint sufficiently sets forth and moving party has provided no legal authority for having more detailed information re rent increases and explaining additional pages to attached lease. = (501/REQ)
